zh.lifeSummary: 當John Montfort於大約1332年出生在英國瓦維其可爾庫頓時，他的父親Piers de Montfort40歲，母親Lora de Astley11330歲。他於1354年與Joan Clinton在英國斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1361年5月25日在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾可爾希爾享年30歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Montfort于大约1332年出生在英国瓦維其可爾庫頓时，他的父亲Piers de Montfort40岁，母亲Lora de Astley11330岁。他于1354年与Joan Clinton在英国斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1361年5月25日在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾可爾希爾享年30岁。

nameMeanings.name: Montfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Monfort
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Monforte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmela, Carmine, Rocco, Rosaria, Sal.  Spanish Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Medardo.

Italian and Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Monforte, from Latin mons ‘mountain’ (genitive montis) + fortis ‘strong’, probably a reference to the strategic position of these locations.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Montfort  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When John Montfort was born about 1332, in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, his father, Piers de Montfort, was 40 and his mother, Lora de Astley, was 11330. He married Joan Clinton in 1354, in Staffordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 25 May 1361, in Coleshill, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Montfort est né environ 1332, à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Piers de Montfort, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Lora de Astley, avait 11330 ans. Il a épousé Joan Clinton en 1354, à Staffordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 25 mai 1361, à Coleshill, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Montfort um 1332 in Coughton, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Piers de Montfort 40 und seine Mutter Lora de Astley 11330. Er hat 1354 in Staffordshire, England Joan Clinton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 25. Mai 1361 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Coleshill, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Montfort è nato il circa 1332 nel Coughton, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, Piers de Montfort, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Lora de Astley, aveva 11330 anni. Lui sposato Joan Clinton nel 1354, nel Staffordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 25 maggio 1361, nel Coleshill, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 30 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: John Montfortが約1332年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコウトンで生まれた時，父Piers de Montfortは40歳，母Lora de Astleyは11330歳であった。1354年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアでJoan Clintonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1361年5月25日にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコーレシュイルで30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Montfort(이)가 대략 1332년 영국 워윅실르 코우그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Piers de Montfort(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Lora de Astley(은)는 11330세였다. 그는 1354년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 Joan Clinton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1361년 5월 25일 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 콜레시에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Montfort nasceu aproximadamente 1332, em Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Piers de Montfort, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Lora de Astley, tinha 11330 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Clinton em 1354, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 25 de maio de 1361, em Coleshill, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 30 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Montfort родился около 1332 г. в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Piers de Montfort было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Lora de Astley, 11330. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Clinton в 1354 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 25 мая 1361 г. в местности колешилл, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 30 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Montfort nació aproximadamente 1332, en Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Piers de Montfort, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Lora de Astley, tenía 11330 años. Se casó con Joan Clinton en 1354, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 25 de mayo de 1361, en Coleshill, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 30 años.
